name: Coyote Texas Tacos
recipeIngredient: 2 red jalapenos (serranos if you don't have, minced)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a stir-fry pan or wok, combine all ingredients except the tortillas.
2. Cook over medium-high heat and continuously stir until the meat crumbles.
3. Remove from heat and cook the tortillas.
4. Fill tacos with the prepared filling.
5. Top with shredded cheese, Pico de Gallo/salsa cruda/hot sauce, sour cream, or minced tomatoes.
6. This meal takes about 10 minutes to prepare and cook.
